title: As US-Israeli airstrikes hit Iran, Kurdish forces eye a ground offensive
summary_full: As US and Israeli airstrikes intensify across Iran, attention is turning to the country’s Kurdish west where Kurdish factions could mobilise quickly if the weakening of the regime's security apparatus opens the door to a ground offensive
